name: insured_name_present
expression: insured_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(insured_name)) > 0
description: insured_name is required for Certificate of Insurance extraction.

name: certificate_holder_name_present
expression: certificate_holder_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(certificate_holder_name)) > 0
description: certificate_holder_name is required for Certificate of Insurance extraction.

name: coverage_lines_present
expression: coverage_lines IS NOT NULL AND JSON_ARRAY_LENGTH(coverage_lines) > 0
description: coverage_lines is required for Certificate of Insurance extraction.
